problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: The key to Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? is Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor — specifically Synaptic plasticity modulation — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
